title: Canned copilot provider seam
predecessor: M33-T7 shipped 2026-04-16, commit 4a373bd (copilot settings + UI; 13 files +818/-3; 1087 → 1094 unit tests, 0 lint errors, 24 warnings steady, typecheck clean across 6 packages).
goal: Materialize the three-tier canned provider seam for copilot LLM completions — mirror M30's test-classifier.ts, M31's test-agentic-provider.ts, and M32's test-agentic-tools.ts structurally. In NODE_ENV=test, the `resolveComplete` dep the composition root wires into `createCopilotAnalyzerService` returns a canned `complete` fn driven by a three-tier lookup: (1) __ECHO_COPILOT__:<json> sentinel in the `user` prompt returns the JSON payload verbatim (fast-path for deterministic specs); (2) CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE lookup keyed by normalized user prompt (for T9's scripted round-trips); (3) FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY fallback returns `[]` (never-throw contract so drifted prompts don't hang E2E runs). Preserves test-agentic-provider's actor-aware routing — when `actor === 'system-copilot'` (per the provider-factory contract) this seam wins; non-copilot actors continue to hit M31's canned agentic provider. Unit tests +5.
acceptance: NEW apps/desktop/src/main/services/test-copilot-provider.ts — three-tier canned lookup returning `(args: { system: string; user: string; signal: AbortSignal }) => Promise<CopilotAnalyzerCompleteResult>`. Sentinel prefix `__ECHO_COPILOT__:` parsed + JSON-echoed; CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE seeded with T9 fixture prompts (start empty; T9 populates); FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY returns `text: '[]', promptTokens: 0, completionTokens: 0, costUsd: 0, provider: 'test-mode', model: 'test-copilot'`.

Composition root (main/index.ts) `resolveComplete` test-mode branch swapped from the T4 inline `async () => ({ text: '[]', ... })` placeholder to `createTestCopilotComplete(...)` — same return shape, zero wire-contract changes. Production branch untouched.

Test seam exports: TEST_COPILOT_SENTINEL + CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE + FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY + createTestCopilotComplete + (optional) addCopilotFixture(key, value) helper for T9 to register per-spec fixtures without mutating the table at module-load time.

NEW test-copilot-provider.test.ts (+5 unit tests): (1) sentinel echoes verbatim JSON payload, (2) canned-table hit by normalized prompt substring, (3) fallback returns empty array JSON, (4) non-finite/empty input rejects with an Error (defensive — user prompt cannot be zero-length in the analyzer pipeline but test seam must never crash a spec), (5) provider/model fields always 'test-mode' / 'test-copilot' regardless of which tier hits.
Lint clean (0 errors, ≤34 warnings — baseline 24). Typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages.
Atomic feat commit: feat(m33): M33 T8 — canned copilot provider seam — alias test(m33) acceptable per plan doc.

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T8 — commit ledger (<sha>). Updates current-task to M33-T9, pending.json T8 status → completed + metrics + T8 note, orchestrator.json tasksShipped 8→9 + inflight.lastShipped "T7"→"T8" + current.unitTests 1094→1099 + commits.T8 + T8 note.
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/index.ts — wire createTestCopilotComplete into the test-mode resolveComplete branch
notes: Structural pattern: mirror apps/desktop/src/main/services/test-agentic-provider.ts + test-classifier.ts + test-agentic-tools.ts EXACTLY. Three-tier sentinel → canned table → fallback. Function-scoped factory with closure over the CANNED table so T9 can register spec-level fixtures. Same normalization (lowercase + trim + collapse whitespace) the M30 classifier uses so T9 fixture keys match live prompts.

T4 comp root has an inline `async () => ({ text: '[]', ... })` placeholder in the test-mode resolveComplete branch — T8 replaces it. The FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY shape matches this placeholder field-for-field so the T4 + T7 E2E behaviour stays identical until T9 registers fixtures.

Non-goal: T8 does NOT touch the agentic-loop test seam (test-agentic-provider.ts). Those two worlds are separated by actor — system-copilot invocations hit this new seam via resolveComplete; system-agent + level-scoped employees continue to hit test-agentic-provider via the agentic-loop path. M31 + M32 contract preserved.
Estimate: 45-60 min. Small surface area. Unit tests straightforward (echo the pattern tests from test-classifier.test.ts). T9 is the full E2E — comprehensively harder, 2+ hour full session.
